Research and development (R&D) expenditure of the adidas Group worldwide from 2010 to 2024 (in million euros)
R&D expenditure of the adidas Group worldwide from 2010 to 2024
This timeline shows the research and development (R&D) expenditure of the adidas Group worldwide from 2010 to 2024. In 2024, the adidas Group spent approximately 170 million euros on research and development.
